mapper.select: SELECT u.id, CONCAT(u.first_name, u.last_name) as name, CONCAT(u.first_name_en, ' ', u.last_name_en) as nameEn FROM user u JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.school_id = #{schoolId} AND r.role_name_en = 'coach' ORDER BY u.first_name, u.last_name
